case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VIRGINIA AGUSTIN CASTRO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 8/17/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,342.08 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, VIRGINIA AGUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JUN-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, VIRGINIA AGUSTIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, VIRGINIA AGUSTIN $1,342.08 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,427.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
